visual_description: The audio is dominated by a high-energy, electronic music track with a driving, percussive beat. The music has a tense and suspenseful mood, creating a sense of urgency and anticipation, as if building up to an important event. A medium shot follows a man in a light green suit jacket and a blue collared shirt as he walks purposefully down a narrow, dimly lit corridor. He has a serious expression and gestures with his right hand as if speaking. Behind him, another man in a patterned shirt follows closely. The corridor is lined with what appear to be storefronts or display cases, with various signs and posters visible on the walls. The lighting is cool and has a blueish tint. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The camera pans to the right, revealing more of the corridor. The man in the green suit continues to walk forward, now flanked by the man in the patterned shirt. They pass by a storefront with a large window display. Inside the display, a white dress is visible on a mannequin. The camera continues to track their movement down the corridor. The camera pans further right, moving away from the men and focusing on a row of aquariums
